rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Implementation-level signal routing contracts should be placed in the target implementation annex
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure and scope rules during AGREE annex insertion
Only insert AGREE contracts that reference valid AADL ports and components in scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions/guarantees; implementation annexes are for bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference ports or components not present in the AADL model scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
